headline: Ethereum Founder Rebuffs Critics, Reiterates Neutral Stance

article.title: Buterin fires back at Ethereum Foundation critics, recommits to neutrality
article.summary: The Ethereum Foundation holds less than 1% of all ETH in circulation while other protocol foundations typically hold 10-50% of their native token's supply, the founder said.

headline: FTX Victims Get $54M Payout in Fenwick Settlement

article.title: FTX law firm Fenwick & West to pay $54M to victims in settlement
article.summary: The law firm agreed to a settlement in February 2026 and is facing a separate $525 million lawsuit over its role in the collapse of the FTX crypto exchange.

headline: Oil Plunges 5% on Iran Deal Progress

article.title: Oil Drops as US Says Deal With Iran and Hormuz Reopening Is Near
article.summary: Oil dropped as the US and Iran edged toward a deal, although President Donald Trump said that Washington’s blockade of the Strait of Hormuz would remain until an agreement was completed.

headline: 10Y Yields to Stay High Post Iran Conflict

article.title: Strategists Warn Yields to Stay High Even If Iran War Ends
article.summary: For all the hand-wringing over war-related inflation fears, there are signs that other drivers are having as much a bearing on longer-term borrowing costs.

headline: CFTC Axes 5 Staff Over Crypto Probe

article.summary: Two officials who intervened to help three firms win approvals over staff objections, per the NYT, have since taken jobs at MoonPay and Gemini Titan.

headline: Ethereum Foundation Cuts ETH Sales Amid 30% Staff Exit

article.title: Vitalik Buterin says Ethereum Foundation will be a ‘smaller ship,’ sell less ETH amid researcher exodus
article.summary: Buterin said the EF is choosing "longevity over breadth," selling less ETH and focusing exclusively on Ethereum's "CROPS" properties.
